allow: Bash(docker exec facebook-monitor-postgres psql -U postgres -d facebook_monitor -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_posts FROM posts;")
Bash(docker exec facebook-monitor-postgres psql -U postgres -d facebook_monitor -c "SELECT post_signature, post_text, page_or_group_name, created_at FROM posts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(docker exec facebook-monitor-postgres psql -U postgres -d facebook_monitor -c "\d posts")

Bash(docker exec facebook-monitor-postgres psql -U postgres -d facebook_monitor -c "SELECT post_signature, author_name, source_url, first_seen_utc FROM posts WHERE source_url LIKE ''%vnexpress%'' OR source_url LIKE ''%kenh14%'' ORDER BY first_seen_utc DESC LIMIT 5;")
